reasoning: The primary uncertainty is whether Rockstar will delay "Grand Theft Auto VI" into 2026. Geopolitical or regulatory risks preventing a European release given a global launch are negligible, so the question reduces to whether the game will launch globally in 2025 as planned. As of February 2025, Take-Two has repeatedly reaffirmed the Fall 2025 window. While Rockstar has a history of delaying major titles (GTA IV, GTA V, RDR 2), Take-Two’s narrowed window to Fall 2025 suggests strong internal confidence and financial incentives to release within the 2025/2026 fiscal year. Therefore, a launch in 2025 is more likely than not, but there remains a ~25-30% chance of a delay.
